[{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"red",italic:1b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"From the ashes of ancient tyrants,",underlined:0b}],text:""},{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"red",italic:1b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"a single ember still breathes wrath into the world.",underlined:0b}],text:""},"",{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"gold",italic:0b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"▶ ",underlined:0b},{bold:1b,color:"gold",italic:0b,text:"Right-click"},{bold:0b,color:"gold",italic:0b,text:" to summon the fury of a skyborn beast"}],text:""},{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"gray",italic:0b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"• Unleashes searing flame wings and vertical blaze",underlined:0b}],text:""},{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"gray",italic:0b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"• Calls down ",underlined:0b},{color:"yellow",italic:0b,text:"three lightning bolts"},{color:"gray",italic:0b,text:" amid circles of fire"}],text:""},"",{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"dark_red",italic:1b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"“Its roar is heard in thunder. Its breath is flame.”",underlined:0b}],text:""},{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"gray",italic:0b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"",underlined:0b}],text:""},{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"gray",italic:1b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"Made with ",underlined:0b},{color:"aqua",italic:0b,text:"ExecutableItems"}],text:""}]

[{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"dark_red",italic:1b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"It doesn’t cut. It sears.",underlined:0b}],text:""},{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"red",italic:1b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"Forged to penetrate shields, walls, souls.",underlined:0b}],text:""},"",{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"gold",italic:0b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"▶ ",underlined:0b},{bold:1b,color:"gold",italic:0b,text:"Right-click"},{bold:0b,color:"gold",italic:0b,text:" to fire a molten beam"}],text:""},{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"gray",italic:0b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"• ",underlined:0b},{color:"red",italic:0b,text:"Burns"},{color:"gray",italic:0b,text:" and "},{color:"dark_red",italic:0b,text:"damages"},{color:"gray",italic:0b,text:" in a 30-block line"}],text:""},{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"gray",italic:0b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"• Dashes forward, then triggers a chained ",underlined:0b},{color:"yellow",italic:0b,text:"explosive shockwave"}],text:""},"",{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"dark_gray",italic:1b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"“No armor. No barrier. Only ash.”",underlined:0b}],text:""},{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"gray",italic:0b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"",underlined:0b}],text:""},{extra:[{bold:0b,color:"gray",italic:1b,obfuscated:0b,strikethrough:0b,text:"Made with ",underlined:0b},{color:"aqua",italic:0b,text:"ExecutableItems"}],text:""}]
